criteria.criterion: DBB-001: Admin panel at /admin returns HTTP 200
DBB-002: Admin panel includes device/model/status pages
DBB-003: GPU detection via hardware.js, exposed in /api/status
DBB-004: gpu-detector.js not referenced anywhere in src/
DBB-005: VAD detects voice activity on server side
DBB-006: VAD silence does not trigger LLM inference
DBB-007: README covers npx, Docker, and API usage
DBB-008: optimizer.js returns non-empty config for all hardware types
